title: Foyrr - AI-Powered Project Management Tool for Architects
content:
Gavel is an AI-powered document automation platform for legal professionals that helps attorneys save time through automated workflows and client intake processes.


Design Challenge:

Transform Gavel's website from a feature-focused platform to a conversion-optimized experience that speaks directly to attorneys' pain points and demonstrates clear ROI.


My Role:

Website Designer & Copy Writer - My role was to redesign the website, and change the copy to boost the conversion rate.


Key Changes & Rationale:

  1. Value Proposition Shift
    • Before: "Document automation software for legal professionals"
    • After: "Set Yourself Free From Manual Paperwork"
    • Why: Addresses emotional pain point directly rather than describing features


  2. Visual Hierarchy
    • Simplified navigation
    • Prominent ROI calculator - simple free tool like this helps in SEO as well
    • Success metrics highlighted (80% time saved, 300% growth)
    • Purple gradient aesthetic for modern, tech-forward feel


  3. Conversion Optimization
    • Added more social proof section with real attorney testimonials
    • Included "Path to 60% Faster Growth" visualization
    • Strategic CTAs focused on "Start Your Freedom Trial"
    • Clear before/after scenarios showing impact


Design Psychology Applied:

  • Used purple/lavender palette from the logo to convey innovation and luxury

  • Implemented clear ROI visualization to reduce purchase anxiety

  • Added social proof from recognized legal firms

  • Created clear value proposition focusing on benefits and dream outcome of the buyers

  • Straightforward and direct language without any jargon to avoid confusion

title: Dealintent: Simplifying the B2B Sales Journey
content:
Dealintent is a B2B sales platform that creates personalized buyer portals, enabling sales teams to streamline deal management, improve buyer engagement, and accelerate decision-making through a unified, intelligent workspace.


Problem Space

B2B sales processes are fundamentally broken:

• 77% of buyers find purchasing complex
• 75% want self-serve experiences
• Sales teams waste 40% time on unproductive activities


My Role: Product Designer and Brand Identity Designer


Starting With Logo Design Strategy

The logo emerged from understanding connection and simplicity.

It features a geometric shape in shades of green, representing connection and simplicity within Dealintent's B2B sales platform.

The green color palette was strategically chosen to differentiate from competitors, while evoking associations of growth, progress, and financial health.

Design System Development

I built a comprehensive component library that standardized interactions across the platform.

The system prioritized reducing cognitive load, ensuring intuitive navigation, and maintaining consistent visual language.

User Research Insights

I mapped over 12 pain points faced by sales teams and identified key friction areas in deal management.

My focus was on prioritizing simplification and transparency to address these challenges effectively.


Design Process Highlights

The design process relied on iterative prototype development, continuous feedback from users, and data-driven decision-making to ensure practical and impactful results.

I created a centralized portal for all deal communications, eliminating email and document fragmentation. This platform serves as a real-time collaborative workspace, streamlining interactions and improving efficiency.

I designed an interactive buyer portals, a drag-and-drop proposal builder, and mutual action plan templates.


Quantitative Impact of the Design

My design reduces proposal creation time by 80%, shortens the sales cycle by 55%, and enhances team productivity by 40% for sales team.


Website/Landing Page Design

Designing a website that’s not just visually appealing but strategically crafted with buyer psychology to drive maximum conversions.

title: Personiq - AI Powered Video Personalization Tool
content:
Personiq is a SaaS platform that empowers businesses to create personalized video experiences at scale using generative AI.


Problem Space

  • Low Engagement with Generic Videos:
    Businesses struggle to connect with audiences using generic video content.

  • Complex Personalization Process: Traditional methods of video personalization are time-consuming and technically challenging.

  • Need for Scalability: Businesses need a solution to personalize videos for large audiences without manual effort.


My Role:

Product Designer and Brand Identity Designer - My role as product designer was to create a logo, brand identity and an intuitive and efficient platform for users to easily generate these personalized videos.


Design Goals:

  • User Flows & Wireframing:
    I developed user flows and wireframes focusing on a logical and intuitive flow for video upload, data connection, personalization, and generation.

  • Simplify the Personalization Process:
    Create a user-friendly interface that makes personalization accessible to non-technical users.

  • Streamline Video Generation:
    Design a clear and efficient workflow for uploading, personalizing, and • generating videos.

  • Ensure Scalability:
    Design the platform to handle large datasets and high volumes of video generation.

Design Process:

  • User Research & Analysis:
    I researched the target audience and analyzed existing video personalization tools to understand user needs and identify areas for improvement.

  • User Flows & Wireframing:
    I developed user flows and wireframes focusing on a logical and intuitive flow for video upload, data connection, personalization, and generation.

  • UI Design & Prototyping:
    I designed a clean, simple and modern UI, prioritizing:

    • Intuitive data mapping: Simplifying data-to-video connection.

    • Visual progress indicators: Providing real-time feedback.

    • Clear data visualizations: Showing data usage in videos.

    • Batch processing considerations: For efficient large-scale video generation.

  • Usability Testing & Iteration:
    I conducted testing to gather feedback and refine the design based on user input.

Key Design Solutions:

  • Intuitive Data Mapping: Simplified data connection for non-technical users.

  • Streamlined Workflow: Clear and concise process for personalization and generation.

  • Visual Feedback: Real-time updates and insights for improved transparency.

Outcome:

The resulting design provides a user-friendly and efficient platform for creating personalized videos at scale.

By focusing on simplicity, clarity, and user feedback, I was able to create a product that empowers businesses to connect with their prospects on a deeper level.


Quantitative Impact of the Design:

  • Reduced Video Creation Time (Up to 90%):
    The intuitive drag-and-drop interface and streamlined workflow simplify personalization, allowing for up to 90% faster creation compared to traditional methods, boosting team productivity. This is a direct result of the design's focus on usability.

  • Increased conversion rates by up to 500%:
    Precise targeting and a polished presentation (enabled by seamless AI and clear visualizations) create stronger viewer connections, leading to significantly higher conversion rates. This results from the design's focus on maximizing the impact of personalization.

title: ReferScout - Employee Referral Program Management Platform
content:
ReferScout is a SaaS platform designed to turbocharge employee referral programs by boosting employee participation, generating quality candidates, and maximizing referral hires.


Problem Space

  • Low employee participation in referrals.

  • Complex and manual referral processes.

  • Lack of visibility and tracking.


My Role:

Product Designer and Brand Identity Designer (Rebranding) - My role was to design the logo, brand identity, and a user-friendly platform that simplifies and gamifies the referral process.


Design Goals:

  • Increase Employee Engagement:
    Design a user-friendly and engaging experience that motivates employees to participate in the referral program.

  • Streamline the Referral Process:
    Create a simple and intuitive workflow for submitting, tracking, and managing referrals.

  • Provide Clear Reporting and Insights:
    Design a dashboard that provides recruiters with comprehensive data and analytics on the performance of their referral program.

Design Process:

  • User Research & Analysis:
    I researched the needs of both employees and recruiters involved in referral programs, analyzing existing solutions and identifying pain points.

  • User Flows & Wireframing:
    I developed user flows and wireframes focusing on a logical and intuitive flow for:

    • Employees: Submitting referrals, tracking their status, and viewing rewards.

    • Recruiters: Managing referrals, tracking progress, running campaigns, and accessing reports.

  • UI Design & Prototyping:
    I designed a clean, simple, and modern UI, prioritizing:

    • Intuitive referral submission: Simplifying the process of sharing candidate information.

    • Visual progress tracking: Providing clear updates on the status of referrals.

    • Gamification elements (leaderboards, contests, rewards): Motivating employee participation.

    • Comprehensive reporting dashboards: Providing recruiters with actionable insights.

  • Usability Testing & Iteration:
    I conducted testing and iterated on the design based on the feedback.

Key Design Solutions:

  • Intuitive Data Mapping: Simplified data connection for non-technical users.

  • Streamlined Workflow: Clear and concise process for personalization and generation.

  • Visual Feedback: Real-time updates and insights for improved transparency.

Outcome:

Through a user-centered design approach, I created a platform that simplifies referral management, leading to increased employee participation, higher-quality candidates, and ultimately, more successful referral hires.


Quantitative Impact of the Design:

  • Increased Employee Participation (Projected 40%+):
    Gamification and intuitive interface drive higher engagement. This is a direct result of the design's focus on user motivation.

  • Faster Time-to-Hire (Projected 30%+):
    Streamlined workflows accelerate the hiring process. This results from optimizing the referral management process.

  • Increase in Referral Hires (Projected 40%+):
    Increased participation and streamlined process lead to more successful referral hires. This is a result of improving referral quantity and quality.
